diagrams.title: Top-Down Parse Tree Construction
diagrams.description: Shows how parse tree grows from root (S) to leaves (terminals) using productions S→aA, A→b|ε for input "ab"
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the top-down parsing process and understand tree building

diagrams.title: LL(1) Parse Table Structure
diagrams.description: 2D matrix with non-terminals as rows (S, A, B) and terminals as columns (a, b, $) showing production entries
diagrams.purpose: Understand parse table organization and lookup mechanism

diagrams.title: Predictive Parser Working
diagrams.description: Stack-based parser architecture showing input buffer, stack, parse table, and parsing actions
diagrams.purpose: Understand the components and flow of predictive parsing algorithm

diagrams.title: Left Recursion Elimination Transformation
diagrams.description: Before/after comparison showing A→Aα|β transforming to A→βA' and A'→αA'|ε
diagrams.purpose: Visualize grammar transformation technique for removing left recursion

diagrams.title: FIRST and FOLLOW Set Computation
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing how FIRST sets are computed by following all derivation paths
elements: Terminals at leaf nodes collected into FIRST set
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the algorithm for computing FIRST sets systematically
